description_long: This doll features a large, stylized head with bright pink, spiky hair sculpted in thick, exaggerated tufts. The face is partially obscured by a black eyepatch adorned with a white skull motif, giving it a punk or rebellious character. The doll wears a black outfit with pink and blue accents, including a jacket and pants, and stands on a round, greenish base. Its limbs are thin and angular, with one arm extended forward and the other bent back, suggesting a dynamic, action-oriented pose. The surface texture is rough and matte, with visible sculpting marks that add to its handmade, urban art aesthetic. The overall appearance is playful and edgy, suitable for display in a street or park setting.
description: A punk-inspired doll with bright pink spiky hair, a skull eyepatch, and a black outfit with colorful accents, standing on a round base. The figure has a rough, handmade texture and a dynamic pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's pink spiky hair, skull eyepatch, and black outfit with visible facial features and forward-extended arm.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the hair, the eyepatch strap, and the angular pose of the arms and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the voluminous pink hair and the back of the black outfit, with minimal facial features visible.
description_view_3: Back-side view showing the hair's texture and the side of the eyepatch, with the doll's stance and base partially visible.
attribute_clothing_style: Urban punk style with a black jacket, pink pants, and blue sleeve accent, featuring a skull eyepatch and rugged, street-inspired details.
attribute_pose: Standing with one arm extended forward and the other bent back, legs apart in a dynamic, action-oriented stance, head facing slightly to the side.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with most facial features obscured by a large eyepatch; mouth and visible eye are expressionless.
attribute_hair_style: Short, spiky, bright pink hair styled in thick, upward-pointing tufts.
